heading: {{claimantName, pluralPossessive}} claim
secondaryHeading: Respond to a property possession claim
paragraph1: You will now be asked to respond to specific parts of {{claimantName, pluralPossessive}} claim.
paragraph2: When they made their claim, they had to give information about:
listItem1: the tenancy, occupation contract or licence agreement you signed to rent your property
listItem2: the notice of their intention to begin possession proceedings, if they served you with one
listItem3: their grounds for possession (their reasons for making the claim)
paragraph3: If any of the information they've given is not correct, you can correct it.
paragraph4: You will also be asked if you want to make a counterclaim against {{claimantName}}. If you do, you will need to explain what your counterclaim is and why you’re making it. You will also need to pay a fee.
paragraph5: The claimant will be able to see your answers.
